arts.ttl: Portugal boss Roberto Martinez says there is 'no doubt' Cristiano Ronaldo will be involved against Scotland as he insists captain does not work or play like a 39-year-old
arts.sum: Portugal manager Roberto Martinez has dismissed speculation that Cristiano Ronaldo could be rested for Tuesday's Nations League clash with Scotland.

arts.ttl: Ronaldo to be unleashed on Scotland as Roberto Martinez scoffs at rest suggestion for Portuguese 'icon'
arts.sum: Ronaldo came off the bench to score a late winner when the two sides faced off in Lisbon last month

arts.ttl: John McGinn given Aston Villa fitness deadline as 30th birthday plans hang in the balance
arts.sum: McGinn and twin sister Katie turn 30 this Friday and the McGinn clan plan to celebrate at Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Scotland ‘believe’ amid threat of unwanted history in Portugal clash
arts.sum: Scotland have never lost five matches in a row as Steve Clarke’s injury-hit side host Portugal and Cristiano Ronaldo at Hampden

arts.ttl: Ben Doak Scotland balancing act required as Steve Clarke plans for 15 years rather than 15 months
arts.sum: Doak was in the starting XI for his country for the first time against Croatia and impressed

arts.ttl: The 'insane' Scotland mentality change Che Adams can't get enough of despite Croatia rescue act being cut short
arts.sum: Adams thoguht he'd levelled at the death in Zagreb only for a VAR check to deny him an equaliser

arts.ttl: Predicted Scotland XI vs Portugal and team news as Steve Clarke eyes Nations League scalp to end miserable run
arts.sum: The Dark Blues will have a big home backing in Mount Florida on Tuesday night under the lights Our time at the major final didn't go to plan and it was ended at the group stage with results in the build-up and after not hitting the heights now expected of the national team.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo Said Fabio Paim was Better Than Him - What Happened Next?
arts.sum: In 2003, Manchester United star Cristiano Ronaldo said Fabio Paim was a better player than him but things did not work out that way.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo sent Scotland warning as Che Adams refuses to bow for his hero
arts.sum: The former Manchester United and Real Madrid hero is still banging in the goals at the age of 39

arts.ttl: How to watch Scotland vs Portugal: Live stream, TV and kick off details for Nations League clash
arts.sum: It's a date with Cristiano Ronaldo and Co once again as Steve Clarke seeks an all important victory at Hampden
